Intraday post (29/Sept)

Weekly post:

No downside confirmation - Weekly post (29/Sept - 03/Oct)

Let’s look at the intraday positioning:

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The speed profile is net negative, creating a net short risk-reversal pattern, with heavy upside short gamma. The centroid is at 6678.14, this is where the upside and downside forces are equal, and look unbreakable during the PM session.

Upside pivot is 6697.41also looks unbreakable after 2PMHere, call skew is tested, and if call demand doesn’t declines, 6715 is the next pinnin level.

Downside pivot is 6649.08Seems very unlikely to be broken. Maybe before 11.30AM with max downside target of 6608, but it would revert back up and pin to 6640, if 6655 rejects the spot.

If upside pivot and centroid is held firmly before PM session, the odds to pin to 6670 increases. This is the strongest local pin.

So the main bet of the market is upside,Secondary bet is a pin to 6670 with upside spike and reversion from the upside pivot.And third is the downside retest, but it has a very low probability.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
